title: Portfolio Construction Literacy
promise: Portfolio construction literacy challenge for diversification, liquidity, risk, return, governance, and rebalancing.
audience: Entrepreneurs managing liquidity, angel investors, next-generation family members, and aspiring allocators
description: Knowledge quiz across Diversification & Correlation, Liquidity & Horizon, Risk & Return, Governance & Rebalancing. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: Portfolio construction literacy challenge for diversification, liquidity, risk, return, governance, and rebalancing.
